channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Why weird JD Vance memes have taken over the internet
item.description: Ironically enough, a divisive moment in the Oval Office last weekend seems to have brought the entire internet together.
item.dc:creator: Joe Berkowitz, Fast Company

item.title: TSMC’s $100 billion U.S. commitment could calm Taiwan tensions
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here. TSMC’s new $100 billion U.S.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Trump says he will 'probably' extend TikTok ban deadline if deal isn't reached in time
item.description: "We have a lot of interest in TikTok. China is going to play a role, so hopefully China will approve of the deal," Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: Siemens announces $285 million investment in US manufacturing
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Siemens plans to invest $285 million in manufacturing in the United States, the tech company said Thursday, including two new facilities in California and Texas. The U.S. is the largest market for the company. The recent investments in the Siemens' U.S.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: The Dark Side of AI: Russian Disinformation Infects World's Most Popular Chatbots
item.description: A study by NewsGuard reveals that popular AI chatbots are infected with Russian disinformation, threatening the integrity of search results and online information.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Tim Scott unveils bill targeting debanking
item.description: Senate Banking Committee Chair Tim Scott (R-S.C.) unveiled legislation Thursday taking aim at debanking.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Micron just demoed the world's fastest SSD with PCIe 6.x tech, a sequential read speed of 27GB/s, and yes, it's just a prototype for now
item.description: Micron’s latest SSD nearly doubles PCIe 5.0 speeds, yet the ecosystem isn’t ready for mainstream deployment.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Monarch butterflies wintering in Mexico rebound this year
item.description: The number of monarch butterflies wintering in the mountains west of Mexico City, rebounded this year, doubling the area they covered in 2024 despite the stresses of climate change.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Seven important trends in the server sphere
item.description: The pace of change around server technology is advancing considerably, driven by hyperscalers but spilling over into the on-premises world as well.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: New Google feature flags when you might be getting scammed in real time
item.description: The two features each work to identify and warn you of a possible scam while it's unfolding, either over text or on a phone call.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Exclusive: the Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge will have durability to match its ‘sexy’ form
item.description: At MWC 2025, Samsung executive Annika Bizon teased the durability credentials of the upcoming Galaxy S25 Edge.
item.dc:creator: axel.metz@futurenet.com (Axel Metz), TechRadar

item.title: Utah becomes the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify ages
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Utah on Wednesday became the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify users’ ages and get parental consent for minors to download apps to their devices. The bill headed to the desk of Gov.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: UK watchdog drops competition review of Microsoft's OpenAI deal
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's competition watchdog said Wednesday it has dropped its review of Microsoft's partnership with OpenAI, saying it's satisfied that the deal doesn't need a closer investigation under the country's merger rules.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Salesforce’s Agentforce 2dx update aims to simplify AI agent development, deployment
item.description: Salesforce on Wednesday released the third version of its agentic AI offering — Agentforce 2dx — to simplify the development, testing, and deployment of AI agents that can automate business processes across departments, such as sales, service, marketing, finance, HR, and operations.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Why you should use dependency injection
item.description: A few weeks ago, I wrote about how a good software team will defer decisions as long as possible. Smart teams will design and build systems that don’t lock them into any particular implementation until it is utterly necessary.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian joins bid to acquire TikTok
item.description: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian has joined billionaire Frank McCourt’s bid to acquire TikTok as a strategic adviser.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Georgia lawmakers push to ban automated speed cameras near schools
item.description: DECATUR, Ga. (AP) — Outside Beacon Hill Middle School in the Atlanta suburb of Decatur, like along hundreds of roadsides across Georgia, the unblinking eye of a camera tickets drivers who speed through a school zone.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: USDA Automates HR Processes with New Technologies
item.description: The US Department of Agriculture (USDA) has implemented new automation technologies to streamline human resources processes, saving time and money.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft rolls out updated Copilot app to Windows 11 testers
item.description: Microsoft has begun pushing out a new version of its generative AI (genAI) Copilot application to users testing new builds of Windows 11. The app has an updated interface with a panel on the right listing the history of queries that have been posed, and the responses on the left.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Electronic employee monitoring reaches an all-time high
item.description: Monitoring of both remote and in-office employees is at an all-time high, a trend highlighted by federal workers being told to report their weekly accomplishments. A study by the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) found that 80% of companies are monitoring remote or hybrid workers.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AI & Data Exchange 2025: GAO’s Lindsey Saul on AI helping speed data analytics, improve oversight
item.description: AI presents opportunities for greater efficiency, but GAO chief data officer says its effectiveness hinges on data quality. The post AI & Data Exchange 2025: GAO’s Lindsey Saul on AI helping speed data analytics, improve oversight first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network
